title: EB on the latest, CC has update - no update buttons
scenario: CC update buttons missing on Home/Settings screens when EB is latest version and CC update is available
steps: Ensure the Embedded Browser (EB) is on the latest version.
Ensure the Companion App (CC) has an update available.
Pair the Companion App with the Embedded Browser for the first time.
Observe the Home screen for any update buttons.
Observe the Settings screen for any update buttons.
Restart the Companion App multiple times (specifically the 3rd, 5th, 10th, 13th, 15th, etc. restarts) and check for the CC update dialog/toaster.
expected: The CC update dialog/toaster should appear on first pairing and on specific app restarts (3rd, 5th, 10th, 13th, 15th, etc.). Update buttons should be displayed on the Home and Settings screens.
